title: 36PCS Happy Birthday Foil Balloons, 18" Round Mylar Helium Balloon Foil Balloons for Birthday Parties Baby Shower Decoration Supplies
features: 12 Pattern Birthday Balloons: This set includes 36 colorful 4D Happy Birthday balloons, with three each of 12 styles and patterns. The sufficient quantity and vibrant designs can meet your diverse decorative needs.

High-Quality Birthday Balloons: Made of high-quality aluminum foil, these birthday mylar balloons are durable, safe to use, and not easy to break or pop, providing a great user experience. They are designed to withstand the party atmosphere and remain strong throughout the celebration.

Perfect for All Happy Occasions: These foil Happy Birthday balloons are ideal party decorations for all ages. The variety of patterns can easily match any party theme and decor. They will sparkle when exposed to light, making your party more vivid and eye-catching.

Easy to Use: The self-sealing valve of these birthday aluminum foil balloons will automatically seal when inflated. These balloons can be attached to walls, doors, tables, windows, and anywhere else for decoration. To deflate, you can use a straw to suck out the helium and reuse the balloons.

Note for Using Birthday Balloons: Do not overfill the birthday foil balloons and avoid exposing them to sunburn or excessive heat. Over-inflation will reduce the lifespan of the balloons. Avoid sharp objects and excessive friction.
description: Product Description HILAVO foil balloons are available in various colors and combinations for you to choose from. Suitable for gold party, silver party, sports party, birthday party and more. HILAVO party balloons with superior foil material, coloful balloons combination and nflation with air or helium. Superior Foil Quality Made of high quality aluminum foil, these golf ball balloons are durable, safe to use, and not easy to break or pop, providing a great user experience. Easy to Use The self-sealing valve of these aluminum foil balloons will automatically seal when inflated. Note for Using Please do not inflate more than 75% of the balloon capacity and avoid exposing them to sunburn or excessive heat.
